settings.title: Settings
settings.reset_confirmation: This will reset all settings to default values. Continue?
settings.debug_mode_desc: Enable debug logging and verbose output
settings.command_execution_desc: Control how AI executes terminal commands. In Whitelist mode, whitelisted commands run automatically, others require confirmation.
settings.command_whitelist_desc: Commands in the whitelist will run automatically without confirmation
settings.file_preview_single_click_desc: Single click to preview, double click to open permanently (like VS Code)
settings.files_exclude_desc: Files matching these patterns will be hidden in the file tree
settings.skills_scan_dirs_desc: Relative to project root and user home directory
settings.reset_confirmation: This will reset all settings to default values, including appearance, editor, terminal, and all configurations.
settings.command_execution_mode_desc: Controls how AI executes terminal commands. In Whitelist mode, whitelisted commands run automatically, others require confirmation.
settings.command_whitelist_desc: Whitelisted commands will execute automatically without confirmation
settings.command_whitelist_placeholder: Add command prefix (e.g. npm, git status)
settings.files_exclude_desc: Configure glob patterns to exclude files and folders from the file tree

model_select.no_models: No preset models for this provider

ai_config.title: AI Configuration
ai_config.api_keys_desc: Configure API Keys and vector search to use AI services
ai_config.api_key_not_configured: API Key not configured, cannot use {{provider}} models
ai_config.enable_vector_search_desc: Use AI Embeddings for code semantic search (understand meaning, not just keyword matching)
ai_config.security_tip_1: API Keys are encrypted and stored locally, never uploaded to any server
ai_config.security_tip_2: Keep your API Keys safe and do not share them with others
ai_config.security_tip_3: If your API Key is leaked, regenerate it immediately on the platform
ai_config.vector_config_tip_1: • Requires corresponding provider API Key (see above)
ai_config.vector_config_tip_2: • Switching provider will automatically rebuild index
ai_config.vector_config_tip_3: • Disabled search still works (using text matching)

welcome.title: Circle
welcome.subtitle: AI-Powered Development Platform
welcome.create_app_title: From Idea to App, One Click
welcome.create_app_desc: Describe your app idea, AI will create it for you
welcome.create_app_placeholder: Describe the app you want to create, e.g.: Create a todo management app...

file_tree.confirm_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
file_tree.rollback_desc: Are you sure you want to rollback changes to this file? All uncommitted changes will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
file_tree.title: Explorer
file_tree.toast_move_exists: A file or folder with this name already exists: {{name}}

editor.undo_all_in_file: Undo all changes in this file
editor.accept_all_in_file: Accept all changes in this file
editor.select_file_to_edit: Select a file to start editing

chat.empty_description_suffix: button in the top right to start a new conversation
chat.revert_dialog_desc_files: The following {{count}} files will be restored:
chat.revert_no_file_changes: This message has no file changes
chat.revert_warning_1: All changes to these files will be overwritten (including your manual edits).
chat.revert_warning_2: This action will not delete message history.
chat.revert_warning_3: Tip: commit important unsaved work with Git first.

clone.title: Clone Git Repository
clone.description: Clone code from remote repository to local

git.reset_dialog_confirm: Reset the current branch to this commit?
git.squash_dialog_description: Squash {{count}} commits from HEAD down to this one
git.squash_history_warning: This rewrites history. Be careful if these commits were pushed.
git.stash_clear_all_description: All stashed changes will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
git.stash_drop_description: These changes will be discarded. This cannot be undone.
git.stash_pop_description: Changes will be applied to the working tree and this stash will be removed.
git.stash_dialog_description_with_branch: Temporarily save local changes on branch {{branch}}
git.stash_message_hint: Add a description to find it later
git.remote_url_invalid: Enter a valid Git URL (HTTPS or SSH)
git.add_remote_description: Configure a remote to push code
git.add_remote_tip_push: After adding, you can use Push to upload code
git.merge_discard_description: You edited the merge result. Closing will lose those edits; conflict files stay as they were.

bug_report.description: Found a bug? Tell us and help us improve Circle.

bug_report.submit_failed_desc: Error saving report, please try again.
